entries.source: "Help me learn supply and demand"
entries.value: "Bantu saya belajar penawaran dan permintaan"

entries.source: "Teach me financial modeling"
entries.value: "Teach saya financial modeling"

entries.source: "Teach me Porter's Five Forces"
entries.value: "Teach saya Porter's Five Forces"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Interactive Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Arahan Interaktif di inspir bagi pembelajaran foundations, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Adapt session untuk anda goal.

entries.source: Adaptive lessons that make you do.
entries.value: Adaptive lessons itu jadikan anda lakukan.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Asas

entries.source: Interactive Instruction
entries.value: Pengajaran Interaktif

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Arahan Interaktif ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Belajar oleh doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, dan proving mastery. aplikasi builds langsung lesson canvas sekitar anda goal bukannya turning instruction menjadi long chat. Try: "Teach saya financial modeling."

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Arahan Interaktif: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Pelajar yang meneroka topik asas yang mahukan panduan praktikal dan bukannya kotak jawapan generik.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Interactive Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Quiz me on Trivia. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Arahan Interaktif. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Uji Saya Dengan Trivia. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Mula dengan contoh prompt.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for interactive instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ini mod ialah tuned untuk Arahan Interaktif dengan nya own prompt, contoh, dan pembelajaran flow.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Arahan Interaktif apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
